chapter_title: Motor Transp. of Migrant Agricultural Workers
text:
(a) This chapter applies to any carrier, including a carrier under contract, who at any time uses a motor vehicle to transport to or from a place of employment in this state at least five migrant agricultural workers for a total distance of more than 50 miles.

(b) This chapter does not apply if:

(1) the carrier is a common carrier;

(2) the motor vehicle used is a station wagon or passenger automobile; or

(3) the carrier is a migrant agricultural worker transporting the worker or a member of the worker’s immediate family.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 647. Motor Transp. of Migrant Agricultural Workers
##### § 647.002 — Application of Chapter

(a) This chapter applies to any carrier, including a carrier under contract, who at any time uses a motor vehicle to transport to or from a place of employment in this state at least five migrant agricultural workers for a total distance of more than 50 miles.

(b) This chapter does not apply if:

    (1) the carrier is a common carrier;

    (2) the motor vehicle used is a station wagon or passenger automobile; or

    (3) the carrier is a migrant agricultural worker transporting the worker or a member of the worker’s immediate family.

*Added by Acts 1999, 76th Leg., ch. 62, Sec. 17.34(a), eff. Sept. 1, 1999.*

the carrier is a common carrier;
the motor vehicle used is a station wagon or passenger automobile; or
the carrier is a migrant agricultural worker transporting the worker or a member of the worker’s immediate family.
